Figure 5: Empirical validation of gradient alignment. Cosine similarity between the true gradient g and the proposed proxy g′ over the time interval t ∈ [0, 1]. The consistent positive alignment across diverse inverse problems on FFHQ and AFHQ-Cat supports the directional integrity of our proxy-gradient strategy.
